scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w @orgonite/shared
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
